title: Prostějov, Olomouc — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Prostějov, Olomouc: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Prostějov is a city in Olomouc with a population of 44,000. A Moravian city with a proud textile and fashion heritage, known for its clothing industry, Art Nouveau architecture, and the annual Prostějov Summer Festival.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
